PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT(ABS(?games1975 - ?games2013) AS ?difference) WHERE {
  ?series1975 wdt:P31 wd:Q2365475 ; wdt:P585 ?year1975 ; wdt:P1200 ?games1975 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?year1975) , "1975-"))
  ?series2013 wdt:P31 wd:Q2365475 ; wdt:P585 ?year2013 ; wdt:P1200 ?games2013 .
  FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?year2013) , "2013-"))
}
